behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all affected files (tests/setupAfterEnv.ts, tests/shared/focusTest.tsx, package.json), the required types (SnapshotTarget, FocusableRef with focus/blur returning void), the functions (formatHTML, getElement, cloneNodes), version pin @sinonjs/fake-timers 15.2.0, and config fields (pnpm.overrides, overrides, resolutions).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what needs to change at a conceptual level (define types, replace any, add null check) without giving exact code or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert very specific implementation details: `querySelector<HTMLElement>` literal (test_get_element_returns_typed_element), `expect(element).not.toBeNull()` literal assertion, `as SnapshotTarget` occurring at least 2 times, and exact regex for `React.createRef<FocusableRef>()`. Valid alternative fixes (e.g., using a different null check, returning `HTMLElement | null`, or using `querySelector<HTMLInputElement>`) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most f2p tests (test_snapshot_target_type_exists, test_format_html_uses_proper_types, test_print_uses_type_assertion, test_focusable_ref_type_exists, test_focus_test_ref_uses_proper_type, test_get_element_returns_typed_element, test_fire_event_calls_without_nonnull_assertion) use regex/substring checks on file contents. Only test_typescript_compiles and lint tests execute subprocesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check for concrete code patterns that require actually implementing the type changes; a stub can't pass without making the edits.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction items (SnapshotTarget, FocusableRef, typed refs, getElement return type, null check, lint, tsc, version pin) are mostly exercised by tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named with docstrings describing fail-to-pass vs pass-to-pass intent.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code/type changes, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers in instruction match those in tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies the files to edit (which is part of task scope), but doesn't point to exact buggy lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold diff only adds pnpm.overrides/overrides/resolutions sections to package.json, a localized change.
